## Summary

I implemented **PRP P1.M3.T4.S2** by creating two new files in the existing `internal/git` package:

**`internal/git/stage.go`** — two thin staging primitives over the shipped `(g *Git) run(args ...string)` seam:
- `HasStagedChanges() (bool, error)` — runs `git diff --cached --quiet` with the **corrected, empirically-verified** exit-code semantics (exit 0→clean=`false`, exit 1→staged=`true` via `errors.As` into `*ExitError{Code==1}`, any other non-zero→error). No unborn-repo special-casing needed.
- `AddAll() error` — runs `git add -A` (returns nil on success incl. nothing-to-stage, typed `*ExitError` on failure).
- Plain `package git` line (git.go owns the `// Package git` doc); imports only stdlib `errors`.

**`internal/git/stage_test.go`** — white-box `package git`, stdlib `testing` only, composing the S2 harness (`newTempRepo`/`seedCommits`/`writeFileStage`/`mustRun`), driving real git 2.54.0. Six behavior-per-function tests covering: clean index→false, staged file→true (on unborn repo), modified+staged tracked file→true, non-repo→typed `*ExitError` (no exit-code pinning), AddAll stages new+modified+deleted (A/M/D via `--name-status`), AddAll on clean repo→nil.

**One issue caught & fixed during validation**: `go vet` flagged a `t.Errorf` call with an argument but no format directive — corrected to `t.Error`.

**Validation gates (all pass):**
| Gate | Result |
|---|---|
| L1 `go build ./internal/git/` | ✓ exit 0 |
| L2 `go vet ./internal/git/` | ✓ clean |
| L3 `gofmt -l internal/git/` | ✓ empty |
| L4 `go test ./internal/git/` | ✓ PASS (6 new + all existing) |
| L5 `go test ./...` | ✓ whole-module green; Makefile `test` green |

**Scope boundaries respected**: only the 2 new files created; no shipped files modified; go.mod/go.sum untouched; `// Package git` appears exactly once (git.go); stdlib-only imports; no go-git/testify; no `go mod tidy`; no staging POLICY (CLI layer = P1.M7.T2). Mode A docs satisfied — both methods carry godoc citing PRD §22.3/§19, FR5/FR16/FR20, decisions.md §1.

   "message": "Created internal/git/stage.go (HasStagedChanges/AddAll primitives over the shipped g.run seam with the CORRECTED exit-code semantics: exit 0→false/clean, exit 1→true/staged via errors.As, other→error) and internal/git/stage_test.go (white-box package git, stdlib testing only, 6 behavior-per-function tests composing the S2 harness against real git 2.54.0). All 5 validation gates pass: go build OK, go vet clean (after fixing a vet-flagged format-string bug), gofmt clean, go test ./internal/git/ PASS (6 new + existing S1/S2/T2/T3/log), go test ./... whole-module green.
